title: Rename device - Rename, spec chars
scenario: Device name with special characters does not persist or reflect on Home screen after renaming in Device Settings > General
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with the Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Tap the device name on the Home screen to open Device Settings.
4. Tap the device's official name field.
5. Enter special characters for the name (e.g., ?*!#$%&'()+,-./:;@[]^_`{|}~).
6. Tap Done to save the new name.
expected: The device name is updated with the special characters and the new name is reflected on the Home screen.
